title: Claim node
description: A hash-anchored span of manuscript text in the evidence-lineage graph (M3.1). The claim_id is hash(normalized_text + file + parser_version), stable to re-wrapping but not to a substantive rewrite.

claim_id.description: SHA-256 hex of the canonical [normalized_text, file, parser_version].

file.description: Manuscript-relative path the span was extracted from.

text_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the RAW span text, so any edit is visible even when the claim_id survives it.

normalized_text.description: NFC-normalized, whitespace-collapsed comparison form of the span.

kind.description: A number points at an experiment run; the others at external sources.

parser_version.description: The extractor version. Bumping it intentionally changes every claim_id.
